name: google/gemma-2-9b-it
frozen_boundary: Phase 3a pre-registration boundary for 3b; handles frozen BEFORE any cross-arm/transport evaluation.

write_handles.note: H_write_fold / H_write_listen unit directions are in the .npz; cosine>=0.7 is a 3b decision, NOT evaluated here.

decision_rule_for_3b: A1 span_stability: per-(item,arm) SPAN_UNSTABLE (shared-prefix ids or challenge span not constant across counter+elicit stages) -> excluded; count reported. A2 listen_ko_reread: LISTEN_KO_CLEARS_FLOOR iff committed listen_mask_rate - neutral_wstar_mask floor >= 0.18; else LISTEN_KO_AT_FLOOR; INSUFFICIENT if either missing. A3 dla_baseline_verdict (per neutral arm vs committed pushed-arm top-5 |attn_delta|): GENERIC_ANSWER_FORMATION if overlap >= 3, DISCRIMINATES if <= 1, else MIXED. B handle_freeze: UNDERPOWERED iff DERIVE fold base rate < 0.5 or no candidates, else FROZEN; a read side with greedy total drop < 0.1 flagged WEAK_AT_DERIVE (still frozen). Read-side greedy stops when marginal fold/listen commit-rate drop < 0.03 or subset size 6. NO cross-transport / one-lever / direct-total decision here (those are 3b); write cosines are report-only.
